title: [全民BNO]英國議員Alistair Carmicahel MP Liberal Democrats寄信比我

replies.msg:
大家快CHECK EMAIL
推動英國給予全部香港人更快更長期既BNO身份
簽左先:https://www.libdems.org.uk/hong-kong
Earlier this year I introduced my Hong Kong Bill. This Bill would extend the British National Overseas Passport offer to all Hong Kongers and commit the UK to stand with the people of Hong Kong. In light of Beijing’s latest violations of the Joint Declaration, this cause has become all the more urgent.

The UK has a moral and legal duty to stand with the people of Hong Kong.

While the UK government has signalled that they may extend visa rights for BNO status holders and their dependents, their plans do not go far enough.

Their proposals do not open the BNO scheme to new applicants who are protesting Beijing’s new power grab.

The Liberal Democrat plan does. My Bill would open the BNO scheme to all Hong Kongers.

Their proposals offer just 12 months extended visa rights with a possible future pathway to UK citizenship.

The Liberal Democrat plan goes further, faster. My Bill includes the immediate full right of abode and a path to UK citizenship. Will you help lobby the UK Foreign Secretary and Home Secretary to back our Bill?
Thank you,

Alistair Carmicahel MP
Liberal Democrats
